subcodes.first_line: O Rustam, praise the Lord, that in the feast of worship thou art the composer, player and singer [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای رستم ستایش نما پروردگار را که در بزم پرستش سازنده و بازنده و خواننده هستی
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @music and singing, @naming of children; of individuals
